detail: 24/24 bf16 default config pass after CB-format-from-dtype change (cb_qk/cb_p now fp32)
13 failed/35 passed. bf8b+lp_acc(fp32_dest_acc_en=False)→PCC 0.0 (accumulators stored bf8b); bf8b+LoFi+fp32_acc+uniform→PCC 0.9046 (degenerate metric artifact)

Floor bf8b accumulator/intermediate CBs to bf16 when fp32_dest_acc_en=False — block-float is unsuitable for running max/sum/score storage. Default path (fp32_dest_acc_en=True→fp32) unchanged. Lower bf8b+LoFi PCC threshold (degenerate uniform = metric artifact, not op bug).
40 passed, 8 skipped. Floor bf8b accum->bf16 applied; LoFi threshold 0.85 (uniform metric artifact); bf8b+lp_acc skipped (block-float needs fp32 acc)
320 passed, 64 skipped (bf8b+lp_acc). uniform gated on rel_rms<=0.10 (near-constant output, PCC uninformative); normal gated on PCC (0.99, LoFi 0.85)
373 passed (was 140), 696 xfailed (was 976), 47 failed. ALL 47 are dtype=FLOAT32: PCC passes (~0.99996) but golden rms~0.0207 > 0.02 target. FP32->TF32 srcA/srcB drop at HiFi2 default.
fp32 needs HiFi4 default (multi-pass recovers TF32 mantissa loss) to meet golden 0.999/0.02. bf16 keeps HiFi2 (HiFi4 known-bad w/ bf16+fp32_dest_acc). Probe HiFi4 vs HiFi2 on failing fp32 shape.

dtype-aware default math_fidelity: fp32->HiFi4 (recovers TF32 mantissa via multi-pass), bf16/bf8b->HiFi2. fp32 golden 47->6 failures: 4 D=1024 OOM (L1 budget, CB scales D_t*4B), 2 S=8192 precision near-miss (rms 0.028, max_abs 0.0034).
